mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in PAYEMS signals improving household income and lower recession risk, increasing expected corporate revenues and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest available value was 132409 thousand as of 2012-01
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month PAYEMS trends are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST crosses above 600 thousand annualized units, residential investment and related durable-goods demand are expanding from depressed levels, supporting earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above 600 thousand annualized units
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest available value was 657 thousand as of 2011-12
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST crossings above 600 are followed by negative average 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if hit rate for positive 60-day returns is below 50% across triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: With FEDFUNDS below 0.25% and CPIAUCSL not accelerating sharply, discount-rate pressure is suppressed while real activity can recover, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 0.08% as of 2012-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not deliver higher mean 20-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations, or if the conditional mean return is negative after transaction-cost-neutral timing.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO over the prior 3 months indicates weakening production volumes and operating leverage, leading investors to cut near-term earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available value was 95.9054 as of 2012-01
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month declines are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if average triggered return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month acceleration in RSAFS above its 12-month trend signals stronger consumer demand and revenue momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets update growth expectations.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above RSAFS 12-month growth
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest available value was 401400 million dollars as of 2012-01
failure_condition: Reject if the 5-day forward return hit rate after RSAFS acceleration triggers is below 50% or if the signal's walk-forward information coefficient is negative over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE falls by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months while PAYEMS rises, recession probability declines and household income improves, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available value was 8.3% as of 2012-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-improvement episodes have nonpositive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if their return distribution is not statistically above unconditional returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized increase above 4% raises expected policy tightening and margin pressure, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 227.033 as of 2011-12
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL inflation triggers are followed by positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if returns are not lower than periods without the trigger in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth is positive and INDPRO is rising, broad demand and production reinforce each other, confirming an expansionary regime that supports positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest available value was 13422.4 billion chained 2017 dollars as of 2011-Q4 vintage availability
regime_hint: broad cyclical expansion after recession shock
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and INDPRO condition has average 60-day S&P 500 returns below zero or underperforms periods when either condition is absent.
